title: plantago holosteum var. littoralis
intro: Plantago holosteum var. littoralis is a coastal variety of the common plantain, a type of herbaceous perennial plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The health benefits of Plantago holosteum var. littoralis include treating wounds, soothing digestive issues, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
